description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI and CD that runs on push to the master branch and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: one for building Docker images and another for running tests that depends on the build job. In the build job, log in to the GitHub Container registry, build and push two Docker images (pepy and pepy-test) with the latest tag. In the tests job, log in to the registry, start a test environment, and run tests using make.
